approvalNote: Second repair pass for two JobDone chunks that still failed strict word matching after the first repair pass.

john_dry_comic.role: Selected JobDone poetic comic narrator; dry northern practical humour

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: Next time the leak returned with wicked grin, our Gary tapped Recall, and looked within. The source came back, not guesswork in disguise: the fitting size, the note, the warning signs. He brought the history in his hand, and made the water bend to his command. No invoice trick. No legal claw. Just grounded memory for the jobs he saw.
takes.title: JobDone - Gary And The Great Leak - chunk 05 repair 2

takes.speaker: storybook_narrator
takes.text: Capture the work, confirm the truth you know, then ask the past which way the pipes should go. So Gary smiled, the job was nearly through; he fixed the leak, and knew what he must do. JobDone remembers what the work has shown. Go to jobdone.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: JobDone - Gary And The Great Leak - chunk 06 repair 2
